DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FINANCE_SOURCE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FINANCE_SOURCE]
( 
	[FinanceSourceID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[Description] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_FinanceSourceID] [char](1)  NULL,
	[OperatingCompany] [nvarchar](10)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [DATETIME]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
